chapter: Chapter: Verghese Kurien—I Too Had A Dream

questions.question: Why is Verghese Kurien called the Father of the White Revolution?

options.B: He led the movement that transformed India’s dairy industry

questions.explanation: Kurien led the cooperative dairy movement that increased milk production across India.

questions.question: What was the main purpose of the White Revolution?

options.A: To improve milk production and farmer income

questions.explanation: The White Revolution aimed to improve dairy production and strengthen farmers’ livelihoods.

questions.question: Why was Anand important in Kurien’s work?

options.B: It became the center of the dairy cooperative movement
options.D: It was the capital of India

questions.explanation: Anand became the birthplace of the dairy cooperative movement led by Kurien.

questions.question: What major problem did dairy farmers face before the White Revolution?
questions.explanation: Farmers were often exploited by middlemen who paid them very low prices.

questions.question: How did dairy cooperatives help farmers?

options.B: By allowing farmers to sell milk collectively at fair prices

questions.explanation: Cooperatives allowed farmers to work together and receive fair payments.

questions.question: What was the main aim of Operation Flood?

options.A: To increase milk production and build a national milk network

questions.explanation: Operation Flood created a nationwide milk distribution system.

questions.question: Which leadership quality helped Kurien succeed?
questions.explanation: Kurien’s vision and determination helped him lead the dairy revolution.

questions.question: What was the long-term impact of the White Revolution?

options.B: India became a leading milk producer

questions.explanation: India became one of the largest milk producers due to the White Revolution.

questions.question: Why were cooperative societies important in the dairy industry?
questions.explanation: Cooperatives allowed farmers to collaborate and improve their income.

questions.question: What role did technology play in the dairy movement?
questions.explanation: Technology improved milk processing, storage, and transportation.

questions.question: What does Kurien’s story mainly highlight?
questions.explanation: The story highlights the importance of cooperation and teamwork.

questions.question: What inspired Kurien to continue working for dairy farmers?
questions.explanation: Kurien wanted to improve the lives of rural farmers.

questions.question: Which economic benefit resulted from the dairy cooperative movement?
questions.explanation: Farmers earned more money through cooperative dairy systems.

questions.question: How did Kurien help farmers gain independence from middlemen?
questions.explanation: Cooperatives allowed farmers to sell milk directly without middlemen.

questions.question: What message does the chapter give about dreams?

options.B: Dreams combined with hard work can change society

questions.explanation: Kurien’s dream of helping farmers led to national progress.

questions.question: Which factor helped increase milk production during the White Revolution?
questions.explanation: Better dairy management and technology increased production.

questions.question: What does Kurien’s leadership show about solving social problems?

options.B: Innovation and cooperation can solve them

questions.explanation: Kurien used innovative cooperative systems to solve farmers’ problems.

questions.question: Which sector of India benefited the most from Kurien’s work?
questions.explanation: Kurien’s work transformed India’s dairy industry.

questions.question: Why is Kurien considered an inspiring personality?

options.B: He improved farmers’ lives through determination

questions.explanation: His work helped millions of farmers and improved rural economies.

questions.question: What does the success of the White Revolution show?
questions.explanation: The cooperative movement showed that teamwork leads to progress.

questions.question: What was one major outcome of Operation Flood?
questions.explanation: Operation Flood created a nationwide milk distribution system.

questions.question: What role did determination play in Kurien’s success?
questions.explanation: Kurien’s determination helped him achieve long-term goals.

questions.question: How did the White Revolution affect farmers’ livelihoods?
questions.explanation: Farmers benefited economically from the dairy cooperative system.

questions.question: What does Kurien’s story teach about leadership?

options.B: Leaders should work for social improvement

questions.explanation: Kurien’s leadership focused on improving society.

questions.question: What is the main theme of 'I Too Had A Dream'?
questions.explanation: The chapter highlights the power of dreams, hard work, and cooperation.
